Durable Bait & Tackle Banners for Marina and Outdoor Storefront Applications

Make the most of your next fishing season with eye-catching bait and tackle banners designed for marine environments. From marina storefronts and bait shops to fishing tournaments and outdoor retail displays, we can help you improve your visibility and attract more customers with professionally designed custom vinyl banners built to withstand marine conditions.

Here at Banners.com, our goal is to deliver a banner that you're proud to display at your marina or bait shop. That's why we take great care in our craft and work closely with you to bring your vision to reality through strict quality checks. Our team includes seasoned graphic designers and production experts who have been with us for many years, deeply familiar with the marine retail industry requirements.

We offer a wide selection of custom bait and tackle banners including sizes ranging from 1'x1' to 8'x50', unlimited design options in our online designer, and production time options to ensure your banner is delivered when you need it for fishing season or your grand opening.

All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA using state-of-the-art, large-format printers for vibrant colors that attract customers from the water and parking areas. Your banner is made with marine-grade materials designed to withstand outdoor elements including sun, wind, and moisture exposure common in marina environments.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Bait & Tackle Banner Materials for Marine & Outdoor Retail Display

13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular choice for bait and tackle shop displays. It has a low shine that reduces glare on water and delivers rich color reproduction for your fishing graphics and text.

13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners

Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material features a high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors perfect for attracting attention from boaters and anglers. The glossy finish gives your bait shop signage a professional, high-end appearance.

18 oz Vinyl Banners

Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest option for challenging marine environments. It features a low luster, blockout coating for superior durability against salt air, UV exposure, and weather conditions.

Mesh Banners

Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material featuring a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for windy marina locations and coastal areas where wind resistance is critical.

Fabric Banners

Made with premium nylon/polyester blend Banner Soft material. This fabric option is ideal for indoor bait shop displays and trade shows, featuring a low shine that produces an upscale look for premium tackle presentations.

Adhesive Banners

Standard Tack Vinyl can be applied to smooth marina surfaces and boat hulls, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained in marine environments.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Finishing Options for Bait & Tackle Banner Installation

Heat Welded Hems & Grommets

Hems consist of one inch of vinyl banner material folded over and heat-welded together to form a strong, weather-resistant hem. We recommend hems for all outdoor bait and tackle banners to increase durability in marine environments.

Top and Bottom Only Hems – Standard finishing option for storefront bait and tackle banners.

All Four Sides Hems – All 4 sides hemmed and grommeted for maximum durability in windy marina conditions.

Pole Pockets

Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner for easy pole mounting at marinas and fishing piers.

  • 2" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter
  • 3" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter
  • 4" Pole Pockets – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter

Reinforced Corners

Reinforced corners provide extra strength for banners exposed to marine winds and are grommeted to each corner for secure mounting.

Reinforced Hems

Reinforced hems feature PVC-coated webbing which increases banner strength and longevity in outdoor marine applications.

Double-Sided Banner Finishing

We can finish double-sided bait and tackle banners up to 150 square feet for maximum visibility from multiple angles at marinas and fishing tournaments.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Bait & Tackle Banner Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges so you can receive your bait and tackle banners when you need them for fishing season, tournaments, or store openings. Our production times range from one to five business days.

1 Business Day Priority

Perfect for urgent bait shop openings or last-minute fishing tournament sponsorships. Get your custom banners fast when timing is critical.

2 Business Days Express

Ideal when you need quality bait and tackle banners quickly but have an extra day for production. Great balance of speed and value.

3 Business Days Standard

Our most popular turnaround option for custom bait and tackle banners. Free standard production time for most custom orders with excellent quality control.

5 Business Days Saver

Save money on your bait shop signage by choosing our 5-Day Saver option when you're planning ahead for the fishing season.

Important Notes:

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time
  • Turnaround starts once file upload is complete and approval is given if a proof is requested
  • Emergency/same day rushes may be available - please contact customer service
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment Methods for Bait & Tackle Banner Orders

All bait and tackle banners must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept major credit cards and check payments for your convenience.

Accepted Credit Cards:

  • Visa
  • MasterCard
  • American Express
  • Discover

Check Payments

We also accept checks, which must be received before your bait and tackle banner order is put into production. For more information on check orders, contact our customer service team.

Billing Process

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your bait and tackle banner order, giving you complete control over the final design and specifications.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Custom Bait & Tackle Banner Delivery

If you have questions about shipping your bait and tackle banners, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground with 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.

Shipping Methods Available:

  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Days)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)
  • UPS Overnight AM

Tracking Information

You will receive a tracking number once your bait and tackle banner package has been shipped, allowing you to monitor delivery progress.

Large Banner Folding Notice

Due to shipping regulations, all vinyl banners exceeding 8 feet in both directions will be folded for shipping. If you do not want your banners folded, please contact us for a custom freight quote.

International Shipping

For international shipments of bait and tackle banners, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS only.

Production Facilities

This product is produced in our Minnesota or Las Vegas facilities, whichever is more beneficial based on customer location and product specifications.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Marina, Bait Shop & Outdoor Retail Uses for Bait & Tackle Banners

We print thousands of custom banners each year for the fishing and marine industry. Explore popular applications for bait and tackle banners from our customers:

Marine Business and Retail

  • Bait shop grand openings and new location announcements
  • Marina storefront advertising and seasonal promotions
  • Tackle store seasonal sales and new product launches
  • Boat rental and fishing guide service advertising

Fishing Events and Tournaments

  • Fishing tournament sponsor recognition banners
  • Angler registration and weigh-in station signage
  • Tournament backdrop banners for photo opportunities
  • Prize and award ceremony displays

Outdoor and Marina Applications

  • Fishing pier and dock advertising displays
  • Marina slip rental and boat storage promotions
  • Waterfront festival and fishing expo booth displays
  • Lakeside and coastal fishing access point signage

Seasonal and Promotional

  • Fishing season opening announcements
  • Live bait availability and daily specials
  • Fishing license sales and boat registration services
  • Charter boat and fishing guide bookings

Educational and Community

  • Fishing safety and conservation awareness campaigns
  • Youth fishing programs and derby events
  • Fishing club meetings and community gatherings
  • Catch and release promotion displays
PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Bait & Tackle Banner Printing

Preferred File Formats

The file that prints best for bait and tackle banners is .eps converted to outline. We can also print high-resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be happy to help optimize your fishing-themed artwork.

File Size and Resolution

Please upload your 60 MB or smaller print-ready file. For the best results with fishing graphics and text, use 300 dpi or higher resolution files. For files larger than 60 MB, please call for instructions to ensure fastest service.

Acceptable File Formats:

  • .eps (preferred)
  • .pdf
  • High resolution .tiff
  • High resolution .jpg

Artwork/Order Proofs

If you would like to review your bait and tackle banner design before production, requesting an order proof allows you to verify correct information. Your proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork and order summary with pricing, billing, and shipping information.

Color Match Proof System

If your bait and tackle banner project is color critical (matching specific fishing brand colors or logos), we recommend using our Color Match Proof System for the most accurate color reproduction. Contact a customer service representative for details.

Design Assistance

Our professional graphic designers can help create custom bait and tackle banner designs featuring fishing themes, marine graphics, and tackle shop branding elements.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Bait & Tackle Banners for Your Marina or Bait Shop

High-quality, high-resolution, and full-color bait and tackle banners take your marine business to the next level. At banners.com, we offer all that and more, including quick delivery and outdoor durability designed for challenging marine environments.

Whether you're opening a new bait shop, promoting a fishing tournament, or advertising your marina services, our custom vinyl banners deliver the visibility and professional appearance you need to attract more customers.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Bait & Tackle Banners?

Customer Service
Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers who understand the fishing and marine industry.

Fast Turnaround
Choose between 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production times to complete your bait and tackle banner order on your schedule, perfect for fishing season deadlines.

Quality Materials
Our banners are made with marine-grade materials and printed using the latest technology for colors that stay vibrant in outdoor conditions.

Live Order Tracking
Track your bait and tackle banner order every step of the way with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

Ready to get started? Request a quote and begin designing your custom bait and tackle banner today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Bait & Tackle Banners

What banner material works best for outdoor marina use?

For outdoor marina applications, we recommend our 18 oz vinyl banners for maximum durability against marine elements, or mesh banners for windy coastal locations. Both materials are designed to withstand UV exposure, salt air, and moisture.

Can I get my bait and tackle banner in time for fishing season?

Yes! We offer production times from 1-5 business days, plus fast shipping options. Our 1-day priority production is perfect for last-minute needs, while our standard 3-day production works great for planned fishing season promotions.

Do you offer bait and tackle banner templates?

Yes, we have a variety of bait and tackle banner templates featuring fishing themes, marine graphics, and tackle shop designs. You can also upload your own design or work with our graphic designers for custom artwork.

What sizes are available for bait and tackle banners?

We offer sizes ranging from 1'x1' up to 8'x50' for standard production. For larger marina displays, we can provide custom quotes for oversized banners through our custom quote system.

How do I hang my bait and tackle banner at my marina?

We offer several finishing options including grommets for rope or bungee cord installation, pole pockets for easy pole mounting, and reinforced corners for extra durability in windy conditions. Choose the option that best fits your marina setup.

Are your banners suitable for saltwater environments?

Yes, our marine-grade vinyl materials are designed to withstand saltwater exposure, UV rays, and coastal weather conditions. The 18 oz vinyl and mesh options are particularly well-suited for challenging marine environments.

Can I get a proof before my bait and tackle banner is printed?

Absolutely! You can request an order proof to review your design, colors, and order details before production begins. For color-critical projects, we also offer a Color Match Proof System for the most accurate color reproduction.

Do you ship internationally for fishing businesses overseas?

Yes, we offer international shipping for bait and tackle banners. Customers must provide shipping labels and customs documentation. We currently accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
